query: Count the number of flooded houses in west and east side with respect to road facing north side in the image? And plot the distribution

input.command:
```python
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
def solution():
    sides = ['West', 'East']
    counts = [9, 4]
    fig = plt.figure(figsize=(6,4))
    plt.bar(sides, counts, color=['blue','green'])
    plt.xlabel('Side of Road')
    plt.ylabel('Number of Flooded Houses')
    plt.title('Flooded Houses Distribution: West vs East')
    return fig
```
